title: Story
description: A user story within a feature. Connects user motivation to acceptance criteria.

id.description: Story identifier, e.g. S1 or S1-submit-form.

acs.description: Acceptance criterion IDs belonging to this story.

independence.description: Breakdown-time determination that this story delivers behavior NOT already delivered by an earlier story in the feature (the story-independence test). Required for every story after the first (the spec gate hard-blocks a later story that omits it or sets distinct_from_prior:false); the first story has no prior and may omit it.

distinct_from_prior.description: True iff building all earlier stories would leave this story's behavior genuinely unbuilt (independently RED-able). False means this story is a subset of an earlier one and must be folded or re-scoped.

rationale.description: One line: the distinct, independently-RED-able behavior this story adds beyond the prior stories.
